subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy noble consort hath come to the Blessed Spot and tarried there for a lengthy period, bringing solace to us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله ان قرینک الجلیل قد حضر الی البقعه المبارکه و مکث مده مدیده و آنسنا
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @role and station of women, @service to others; to the Cause of God
